2604.14941.title: Text2Arch: A Dataset for Generating Scientific Architecture Diagrams from Natural Language Descriptions
2604.14941.paper_summary: Communicating complex system designs or scientific processes through text alone is inefficient and prone to ambiguity. A system that automatically generates scientific architecture diagrams from text with high semantic fidelity can be useful in multiple applications like enterprise architecture visualization, AI-driven software design, and educational content creation. Hence, in this paper, we focus on leveraging language models to perform semantic understanding of the input text description to generate intermediate code that can be processed to generate high-fidelity architecture diagrams. Unfortunately, no clean large-scale open-access dataset exists, implying lack of any effective open models for this task. Hence, we contribute a comprehensive dataset, \system, comprising scientific architecture images, their corresponding textual descriptions, and associated DOT code representations. Leveraging this resource, we fine-tune a suite of small language models, and also perform in-context learning using GPT-4o. Through extensive experimentation, we show that \system{} models significantly outperform existing baseline models like DiagramAgent and perform at par with in-context learning-based generations from GPT-4o. We make the code, data and models publicly available.
2604.14941.paper_summary_zh: 傳達複雜的系統設計或科學過程僅透過文字進行是低效且容易產生歧義的。從文字中自動生成具有高語義忠實度的科學架構圖的系統在多個應用中都能發揮作用，例如企業架構可視化、人工智慧驅動的軟體設計和教育內容創建。因此，在本文中，我們專注於利用語言模型對輸入文本描述進行語義理解，以生成可以處理以生成高保真架構圖的中間代碼。不幸的是，目前不存在乾淨的大規模開放訪問數據集，這意味著缺乏任何有效的開放模型來執行這項任務。因此，我們貢獻了一個綜合數據集，\system，包含科學架構圖像、相應的文本描述和相關的DOT代碼表示。利用這一資源，我們對一系列小型語言模型進行了微調，並使用GPT-4o進行上下文學習。通過廣泛的實驗，我們顯示\system{}模型顯著超越現有的基準模型，如DiagramAgent，並與基於上下文學習的GPT-4o生成結果相當。我們將代碼、數據和模型公開提供。
2604.14941.author: Shivank Garg et.al.
2604.14941.authors: Shivank Garg, Sankalp Mittal, Manish Gupta
